steps.observed: App loaded with language selector, strategy dropdown, date pickers, and Run Backtest button

steps.action: Click start date input and type 2021/01/01
steps.observed: Calendar showed January 2021 with day 1 highlighted in red. Date field updated to 2021/01/01
Field value confirmed as 2021/01/01 via get value

evidence.consoleErrors: 2x 'save is not defined' (non-critical, from QuantStats iframe)

assertions.title: Stock dropdown shows ticker and name

steps.action: Switch to Stock Analysis tab after running backtest
steps.expected: Stock Analysis tab opens with stock dropdown
steps.observed: Tab switched to Stock Analysis, dropdown visible with label 'Select a stock to analyze:'

steps.action: Click stock dropdown to expand options
steps.expected: Dropdown shows stocks in 'TICKER - 股票名称' format
steps.observed: Dropdown expanded showing: 000786 - 北新建材, 002233 - 塔牌集团, 600618 - 氯碱化工, 600675 - 中华企业, 600821 - 金开新能

steps.expected: Sidebar has a language selector dropdown
steps.observed: Language selector combobox visible at top of sidebar, labeled 'Language', showing 'English' selected
Dropdown expanded showing option 'English' (selected) and option '中文'

steps.action: With English selected, verify sidebar labels
steps.expected: Strategy, Start Date, End Date, Initial Capital (¥), 🚀 Run Backtest
steps.observed: Sidebar showed: 'Backtest Configuration', 'Strategy', 'Date Range', 'Start Date', 'End Date', 'Initial Capital (¥)', '🚀 Run Backtest'
Tab names: '📊 Portfolio Overview', '📈 Stock Analysis'
Streamlit reran and all UI labels changed to Chinese

steps.expected: 策略, 开始日期, 结束日期, 初始资金 (¥), 🚀 运行回测
steps.observed: Sidebar showed: '回测配置', '策略', '日期范围', '开始日期', '结束日期', '初始资金 (¥)', '🚀 运行回测'
Title: '📈 A股量化交易仪表盘'

steps.expected: 📊 投资组合概览, 📈 个股分析
steps.observed: Tab names: '📊 投资组合概览', '📈 个股分析'

steps.action: With 中文 selected, run backtest and scroll to QuantStats tearsheet
steps.expected: Tearsheet uses Chinese HTML template with Chinese section headers
steps.observed: Tearsheet header: '投资组合分析报告 (QuantStats)'. Tearsheet title: '投资组合报告 (Compounded)'. Footer: '由 QuantStats (v 0.0.81) 生成'. Metric cards showed Chinese labels: 总收益率, 年化收益率, 夏普比率, 索提诺比率, 最大回撤, 胜率

evidence.consoleErrors: 2x 'save is not defined' (non-critical, from QuantStats iframe)

steps.expected: QuantStats tearsheet renders with English labels
steps.observed: Tearsheet header changed to 'Portfolio Tearsheet (QuantStats)'. Tearsheet title: 'Portfolio Tearsheet (Compounded)'. Footer: 'Generated by QuantStats (v. 0.0.81)'. Charts showed English titles: 'Cumulative Returns vs Benchmark'

frictions.description: The date input required using keyboard (Ctrl+A then typing) rather than the fill command to change the value. The initial fill command did not update the Streamlit date picker value.
frictions.resolution: Used click + Ctrl+A + keyboard type + Enter to successfully set the date to 2021/01/01

frictions.description: After switching language, the start date value reverted to the default (2025/12/28) instead of preserving the manually set 2021/01/01. This is expected Streamlit behavior (widget default values reset on rerun).
frictions.resolution: Not a bug — Streamlit date_input uses default_value on each rerun. The min_value still allows 2021-01-01.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Language switcher (VAL-UX-003) shows English/中文 options. English mode (VAL-UX-004) renders all UI labels in English. Chinese mode (VAL-UX-005) renders all UI labels in Chinese. Start date allows 2021-01-01 (VAL-UX-001). Stock dropdown shows ticker + Chinese name format (VAL-UX-002). QuantStats tearsheet uses Chinese template in 中文 mode (VAL-UX-006) and English template in English mode (VAL-UX-007). Minor console errors ('save is not defined') from QuantStats iframe are non-functional.
